features: Uniquely designed for confident, assertive and ambitious man
Perfectly suitable for gentleman in you
Creates an aura of freshness and Composure
Ideal for the urban, Cosmopolitan male
description: Product Description This is a fresh, aromatic and woody fragrance for men released in 1964. It contains of lemon, bergamot, lavender, anise, basil, geranium, jasmine, ylang-ylang, sandalwood, oakmoss, vetiver, patchouli, tonka bean and vanilla. Note: Date mentioned on the item is Manufactured date and not the Expiry date Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Aqua, Parfum, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Propylene glycol, Benzyl alcohol, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Citral, Citronellol, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 1 4700. CI 19140. Directions Spray on skin for daily use Safety Warning Keep in Cool Dry Place Legal Disclaimer Our Products are aimed at customers who have already purchased and experienced the product, either its use in the case of skincare, or smell in terms of perfume, or color in terms of make up. Box Contains 1 x Brut Original 100ml EDT Spray See more
